# Canonical Entity Model

<!-- snapshot-hash: {{snapshot_hash}} -->

> **[INCREMENTAL]** — Tier-2 artifact. Populated after Tier-1 (service-catalog + interaction-graph)
> validates on a real project.
>
> **Correlation rule (RT2-F15):** every auto-match is `[UNVERIFIED]`. There is no confident
> auto-merge. A match is a *suggestion* surfaced to a human consent gate — confirm before
> promoting any entity to canonical status.
>
> **Glossary** (`system-glossary.md`) is an **output** — it records each suggestion plus the
> human verdict. It is NOT an input to the correlation algorithm.

## Correlation Suggestions (all [UNVERIFIED])

| Entity A (Service) | Entity B (Service) | Match Reason | Type Note | Human Verdict |
|--------------------|--------------------|--------------|-----------|---------------|
| {{entity_a}} ({{service_a}}) | {{entity_b}} ({{service_b}}) | {{reason}} | compatible \| mismatch:uuid-vs-int64 | [UNVERIFIED] |

**Type-note legend:**
- `compatible` — id_type fields belong to the same family (e.g. `uuid`+`string`, `int32`+`int64`).
- `mismatch:<family_a>-vs-<family_b>` — id_type families differ; human arbitration required.

## Notes

- `visibility` ∈ `{public, internal, private}` (default `internal` per neutral-digest schema).
- Only `public` entities (or human-confirmed ones) are promoted here.
- Re-run synthesis after promoting entities — the glossary will record the verdict.
